description: Render markdown content with progressive enhancement. Supports external files, inline content, pluggable parsers, and VB theme integration.

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Defer fetch until element enters viewport (Phase 3)

attributes.name: highlight
attributes.description: Fire per-block markdown-viewer:highlight events after render

attributes.name: ping
attributes.description: URL to ping with render metadata via sendBeacon

attributes.name: data-error
attributes.description: Present if fetch or parse fails

events.name: markdown-viewer:rendered
events.description: Fired after parse and render complete

events.name: markdown-viewer:highlight
events.description: Fired per code block when highlight attribute is set

events.name: markdown-viewer:error
events.description: Fired on fetch or parse failure

properties.name: parser
properties.description: Custom parser function (markdown string → HTML string). Overrides the default marked parser.

methods.name: render()
methods.description: Force a re-render from the current content source

methods.name: reload()
methods.description: Re-fetch the src URL and re-render
